info.title: build-license
info.description: A DotNet tool to build a license file including all nuget-packages referenced in a solution.

options.name: --input
options.description: The path to the solution file to process.

options.name: --output
options.description:
The name of the license file that is created.
An existing file will be overwritten without confirmation.
Default is Notice.txt in the same folder as the solution.

options.name: --exclude
options.description: A regular expression to specify package ids to exclude from output.

options.name: --recursive
options.description: A flag to indicate that all dependencies should be scanned recursively.

options.name: --offline
options.description: A flag to indicate that only the locally cached packages should be scanned (requires a restore beforehand).
